title: Evaluate the Microtask Checkpoint Timing
description: Explain the concept of microtask checkpoints and their timing within the Event Loop. Distinguish the execution priority of `process.nextTick` versus `Promise.resolve`. Evaluate microtask scheduling to ensure deterministic execution and prevent starvation of other operations.
objectives: Explain the concept of microtask checkpoints and their timing within the Event Loop.
Distinguish the execution priority of `process.nextTick` versus `Promise.resolve`.
Evaluate microtask scheduling to ensure deterministic execution and prevent starvation of other operations.
